title: Tester v0.4.13 Five Calculators
notes:
Changes:
- Adds Boost Goal Calculator, bringing the calculator tab to 5 calculators.
- Keeps NPC Kills Calculator.
- NPC Kills Calculator now explains how to get seconds per kill:
  time 10 kills, then divide the total seconds by 10.
- Keeps Tester approved data auto-load and tester/latest-data-update.json.

Calculators:
1. Token / Income Calculator
2. Stat Gains Calculator
3. Goal Time Calculator
4. Boost Goal Calculator
5. NPC Kills Calculator
